verification_notes: High-season green fee (Nov–Mar) not confirmed from a current source — provisional figure of ฿3,150 sourced from golfsavers.com pricing data ('3150 3150 1000 THB' visible in page content, believed to represent high-season GF). Low-season GF ฿1,850 confirmed by multiple sources (phuketgolfcourse.com, phuketgolfholidays.com). Course located in Phang Nga province (Thai Muang District) but published under phuket region per pipeline instructions. Province field set to Phang Nga as factually correct. Opened 2021 — formerly Thai Muang Beach Golf & Marina site; Pacific Coast Design (Paul Reeves & Phil Ryan) redesigned the layout, retaining approximately 30% of original land. Caddie (฿400) and cart (฿700) are both compulsory. Green fees follow Phuket seasonal model: green_fee_weekday_thb = low season (Apr–Oct) ฿1,850; green_fee_weekend_thb = high season (Nov–Mar) ฿3,150 (provisional — verify before publishing). priceRange for Stage 5: ฿฿฿ (high-season all-in ฿3,150+฿400+฿700 = ฿4,250). Low-season all-in = ฿2,950 which would be ฿฿. Stage 5 author should confirm high-season rate before assigning priceRange. Coordinates are model estimates based on Thai Muang Beach, Phang Nga — approximately 8.47°N 98.27°E.

disputes.note: High-season GF (Nov–Mar) of ฿3,150 is provisional — sourced from golfsavers page pricing text ('3150 3150 1000 THB') which lacked clear labels. No other source confirmed a separate high-season rate. Recommend verifying directly with course (booking@aquellagolf.com or +66 76 679 308) before Stage 5 publication.

designer.value: Pacific Coast Design (Paul Reeves & Phil Ryan)

green_fee_weekday_thb.note: Low season (Apr–Oct) green fee only. Caddie ฿400 + cart ฿700 both compulsory. Low-season all-in = ฿2,950.

green_fee_weekend_thb.note: High season (Nov–Mar) — PROVISIONAL. Sourced from golfsavers pricing text; not explicitly labelled as high-season rate. Verify with course before publishing. High-season all-in (if correct) = ฿4,250.

prose.overview: Aquella Golf & Country Club is one of Thailand's newest championship courses, opened in 2021 on a spectacular site at Thai Muang Beach in Phang Nga province — approximately 40 minutes north of Phuket International Airport along the Andaman coastline. The course was built on the land of the former Thai Muang Beach Golf & Marina and represents a near-total redesign: Australian firm Pacific Coast Design (Paul Reeves and Phil Ryan) retained only about 30% of the original land, constructing a modern 18-hole, par-72 layout of over 7,000 yards with sand-based fairways and Platinum Paspalum grass throughout. The result is a year-round course with excellent drainage that holds its surface quality well into the wet season. Aquella sits within a broader resort development that includes villas, a beach club, tennis courts, a fitness centre, and water sports — making it one of the most comprehensively equipped golf and leisure destinations in southern Thailand. The 11th hole, a 186-yard par-three with views across the Andaman Sea, is the signature hole.
prose.layout_and_experience: At 7,019 yards from the championship tees, Aquella is a long course by Thai standards. The par-72 layout was designed with sand-based construction throughout — fairways, greens, and tees all use Platinum Paspalum grass, a species chosen for its tolerance of heat, salt air, and heavy rain. The result is firm, fast turf that rewards controlled ball flight and accurate iron play over the brute length approach that some long-course designs allow. Water features on several holes, and the coastal terrain means the Andaman Sea is visible from multiple vantage points, most dramatically on the par-three 11th, where the green is framed against open sea. The course plays through a mix of open coastal land and more enclosed sections near the resort villas, giving the round variety in scale and character. Caddies and carts are both compulsory; individual carts are required (one golfer per cart). The course opened in 2021 so the greens and fairways are still maturing to their full character — but the quality of the surfaces from day one has been noted by reviewers as above the standard for a course of this age.
prose.tips: Aquella is located north of Phuket, making it most practical for golfers based in northern Phuket (Khao Lak, Thai Muang area) or those doing a dedicated Phang Nga golf day from Phuket. The drive from Patong is around 70–80 minutes; factor this into early tee time planning. Book directly through the course (booking@aquellagolf.com) or via specialist booking agents — the low-season rate (฿1,850 green fee, April–October) represents excellent value for a course of this quality and scale. Morning tee times are preferable in the hot months (March–May). Aquella's beach club access makes it an appealing full-day destination: golf in the morning, beach in the afternoon. The Platinum Paspalum surfaces play firm and fast — bring your low-flight irons and expect greens that don't hold pitch marks as readily as the softer bent-grass greens found on some other courses.
prose.location_and_access: Aquella Golf & Country Club is located at 157/12 Moo 9, Limdul Road, Thai Muang District, Phang Nga 82120 — on the Andaman coast approximately 44 km north of Phuket International Airport, a 40-minute drive under normal conditions. Visitors from Bangkok fly to Phuket (approximately 1 hour 20 minutes) and then transfer north by car. Grab is available from the airport; hotel transfers from northern Phuket hotels are the most convenient option. The course is also accessible from Khao Lak resorts, approximately 25–30 minutes south.
prose.rental_cta_context: Playing Aquella Golf & Country Club on a Phang Nga coast trip? If your journey includes Bangkok before or after, rent TaylorMade or Callaway clubs delivered to your hotel — no airline fees, ready when you land.

en.title: Aquella Golf & Country Club — Green Fees, Course Guide & Golf Club Rentals
en.meta_description: Aquella Golf Phang Nga: par-72, 7,019 yards, opened 2021. Low season from ฿1,850 / high season from ฿3,150. 40 min north of Phuket Airport. Caddie & cart compulsory.
